structural_description: The image contains a black background with white text. The text is centered and reads: "Last time, I asked: 'What does mathematics mean to you?', and some people answered: 'The manipulation of numbers, the manipulation of structures.' And if I had asked what music means to you, would you have answered: 'The manipulation of notes?' " -Serge Lang
